title: Making a Booking
scene: A freight forwarder contacts a shipping line to book space.
scene_zh: 货运代理向船公司询价并订舱。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Good morning. I'd like to make a booking for a 40HQ container.
lines.zh: 早上好，我想订一个40尺高柜。

lines.label: 船公司
lines.en: Good morning. What's the trade lane?
lines.zh: 早上好，请问走哪条航线？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: From Shanghai to Rotterdam. ETD around the 15th of this month.
lines.zh: 上海到鹿特丹，预计本月15号左右开船。

lines.label: 船公司
lines.en: We have the Ever Glory departing Shanghai on the 16th, ETA Rotterdam in 28 days.
lines.zh: 我们有"永荣"轮16号从上海出发，预计28天后到达鹿特丹。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: That works. What is the CY cut-off date?
lines.zh: 可以，集装箱堆场的截关日期是哪天？

lines.label: 船公司
lines.en: CY cut-off is the 13th at noon. Documentary cut-off is the 14th at 17:00.
lines.zh: 堆场截关是13号中午，截单是14号下午5点。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Perfect. What is the all-in freight rate to Rotterdam?
lines.zh: 好的，到鹿特丹的综合运费是多少？

lines.label: 船公司
lines.en: USD 2,200 per 40HQ, all-in including origin THC but excluding destination THC.
lines.zh: 每个40尺高柜2200美元，包含起运港码头费，不含目的港码头费。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Accepted. Please proceed with the booking and send me the booking confirmation.
lines.zh: 接受，请帮我确认订舱并发送订舱确认书。

lines.label: 船公司
lines.en: Booking confirmed. Your booking number is SHA-2024-08851. Please submit shipping instructions by the 14th.
lines.zh: 订舱已确认，订舱号是SHA-2024-08851，请在14号前提交装船指示。

title: Freight Rate Inquiry
scene: A customer asks a freight forwarder for a shipping quotation.
scene_zh: 客户向货运代理询问运费报价。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Hello, we need a quotation for shipping goods to New York.
lines.zh: 您好，我们需要一个发货到纽约的运费报价。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Sure. Could you tell me the cargo details? Weight, volume, and type of goods?
lines.zh: 没问题，能告诉我货物详情吗？重量、体积和货物种类？

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: It's electronics, about 500 cartons, 3,000 KGS and 15 CBM.
lines.zh: 是电子产品，大约500箱，3000公斤，15立方米。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Will that be FCL or LCL?
lines.zh: 请问走整柜还是拼箱？

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: LCL please. We don't have enough cargo for a full container.
lines.zh: 走拼箱，我们的货量不够装整柜。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Understood. The LCL rate from Shanghai to New York is USD 85 per CBM, including origin charges.
lines.zh: 明白了。上海到纽约的拼箱费率是每立方米85美元，包含起运港费用。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Does this include destination customs clearance?
lines.zh: 这包含目的港清关费用吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: No, customs clearance at destination is separate, approximately USD 180.
lines.zh: 不包含，目的港清关费用另计，大约180美元。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What is the transit time?
lines.zh: 运输时间是多久？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Approximately 25-28 days from Shanghai to New York. Please note LCL adds 3-4 days for CFS handling.
lines.zh: 从上海到纽约大约25-28天。请注意拼箱在货运站的操作还需多3-4天。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Okay, please send me a formal written quotation.
lines.zh: 好的，请将正式报价以书面形式发给我。

title: Bill of Lading Amendment
scene: A shipper needs to amend details on the bill of lading after sailing.
scene_zh: 发货人需要在开船后修改提单上的信息。

lines.label: 发货人
lines.en: Hello, I need to amend the consignee name on our bill of lading.
lines.zh: 您好，我需要修改我们提单上的收货人名称。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: I see. Has the vessel already sailed?
lines.zh: 好的。请问船已经开了吗？

lines.label: 发货人
lines.en: Yes, it sailed two days ago from Shanghai.
lines.zh: 是的，两天前从上海开的。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: In that case, we'll need to submit a B/L amendment request to the shipping line. There will be an amendment fee.
lines.zh: 那我们需要向船公司提交提单修改申请，会有修改费用。

lines.label: 发货人
lines.en: How much is the amendment fee?
lines.zh: 修改费用是多少？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Typically USD 50 to 100 per amendment. The shipping line will confirm the exact amount.
lines.zh: 通常每次修改50到100美元，具体金额由船公司确认。

lines.label: 发货人
lines.en: That's fine. Please go ahead. The correct consignee is XYZ Trading Ltd., based in Frankfurt.
lines.zh: 没问题，请继续处理。正确的收货人是XYZ贸易有限公司，位于法兰克福。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Got it. Could you also provide the correct address and contact details?
lines.zh: 好的，能提供正确的地址和联系方式吗？

lines.label: 发货人
lines.en: Sure. The address is 45 Hauptstrasse, 60311 Frankfurt. Contact: Mr. Müller, +49 69 12345678.
lines.zh: 当然。地址是法兰克福Hauptstrasse 45号，60311。联系人：Müller先生，+49 69 12345678。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Perfect. I'll submit the amendment request now and update you once the revised B/L is issued.
lines.zh: 好的，我现在就提交修改申请，修改后的提单签发后立即通知您。

title: Cargo Tracking
scene: A customer follows up on the status of their shipment.
scene_zh: 客户跟进货物运输状态。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Hi, can you give me an update on our shipment? The B/L number is MAEU-987654321.
lines.zh: 您好，能告诉我货物的最新状态吗？提单号是MAEU-987654321。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Let me check the system. One moment please.
lines.zh: 让我查一下系统，请稍等。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: I've got the details. The vessel departed Shanghai on March 5th and is currently at sea.
lines.zh: 查到了，船于3月5日离开上海，目前在海上。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: When is the ETA at Hamburg?
lines.zh: 预计什么时候到汉堡？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: The ETA at Hamburg is March 30th. However, there may be a 1-2 day delay due to port congestion.
lines.zh: 预计3月30日到汉堡，但因港口拥堵可能延迟1-2天。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Does this ship call directly at Hamburg or is there a transshipment?
lines.zh: 这班船直接到汉堡还是需要中转？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: There is a transshipment at Singapore. The feeder vessel to Hamburg departs Singapore on March 15th.
lines.zh: 需要在新加坡中转，转至汉堡的支线船于3月15日离开新加坡。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: I see. Will we receive an arrival notice before the vessel arrives?
lines.zh: 明白了，船到之前我们会收到到港通知吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Yes, you'll receive an arrival notice about 5 days before arrival. We'll also email you the D/O information.
lines.zh: 会的，到港前约5天您会收到到港通知，我们也会将提货单信息发邮件给您。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Great. Please also send us the customs clearance documents checklist.
lines.zh: 很好，请也把清关所需文件清单发给我们。

title: Handling Cargo Damage
scene: A consignee reports damaged cargo and asks for assistance.
scene_zh: 收货人报告货物损坏并寻求协助处理索赔。

lines.label: 收货人
lines.en: We have a problem. Our shipment arrived with 30 damaged cartons.
lines.zh: 我们遇到问题了，这票货到港时有30箱破损。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: I'm sorry to hear that. Was the damage noted on the delivery receipt?
lines.zh: 很遗憾听到这个消息，破损情况在提货单据上注明了吗？

lines.label: 收货人
lines.en: Yes, we noted it on the delivery receipt before signing.
lines.zh: 是的，我们在签字之前在提货单据上注明了破损情况。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Good. That's very important for your claim. You should also take detailed photos of the damage.
lines.zh: 很好，这对您的索赔非常重要。您还应该对损坏情况拍详细的照片。

lines.label: 收货人
lines.en: We have photos. What documents do we need for the insurance claim?
lines.zh: 我们已经拍了照片，保险索赔需要哪些单据？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: You'll need the B/L, commercial invoice, packing list, insurance policy, damage photos, and a survey report.
lines.zh: 您需要提单、商业发票、装箱单、保险单、损坏照片和公估报告。

lines.label: 收货人
lines.en: How do we get a survey report?
lines.zh: 公估报告怎么取得？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: You need to hire an independent cargo surveyor. We can recommend one in your area.
lines.zh: 您需要聘请独立货物公估人，我们可以为您推荐当地的公估公司。

lines.label: 收货人
lines.en: Yes, please. Also, is there a time limit for filing the claim?
lines.zh: 好的，请推荐。还有，索赔有时间限制吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: For visible damage, you must notify the carrier within 3 days of delivery. Please act quickly.
lines.zh: 对于明显损坏，您必须在提货后3天内通知承运人，请尽快行动。

title: Urgent Air Freight
scene: A customer needs to ship cargo urgently and considers air freight.
scene_zh: 客户有急货需要出运，考虑空运方案。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: We have an urgent situation. Our cargo must reach Chicago by March 20th.
lines.zh: 我们有紧急情况，货物必须在3月20日前到达芝加哥。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Today is March 10th. Ocean freight would take about 30 days — that won't work.
lines.zh: 今天是3月10日，海运大约需要30天，来不及了。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What about air freight? How long would it take?
lines.zh: 空运呢？需要多长时间？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Air freight from Shanghai to Chicago takes 3 to 5 days. You'd arrive comfortably before the 20th.
lines.zh: 上海到芝加哥空运需要3到5天，完全赶得上20号。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What is the air freight rate?
lines.zh: 空运费率是多少？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: The current rate is about USD 6.50 per KG. What is the weight and volume of your cargo?
lines.zh: 目前的费率大约是每公斤6.50美元，请问货物的重量和体积是多少？

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: 300 KGS and 1.5 CBM.

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: The volumetric weight is 250 KGS, so the chargeable weight is 300 KGS. Total air freight would be USD 1,950.
lines.zh: 体积重量是250公斤，所以计费重量是300公斤，空运费合计1950美元。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: That's expensive but we have no choice. Can the cargo fly out by March 12th?
lines.zh: 价格贵了些但我们别无选择，货物能在3月12日前飞出去吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Yes, if you deliver cargo to our warehouse by tomorrow noon, we can book it on a flight departing March 12th.
lines.zh: 可以，如果您明天中午前将货物送到我们的仓库，我们可以预订3月12日出发的航班。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Perfect. Please proceed with the booking and send us the Air Waybill details.
lines.zh: 好的，请确认订舱并将航空运单信息发给我们。
